problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
hypothesis: If Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region is applied to they, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
